global.title: Yozma IN10 Pro Review: $2,000 buys 50mph Sur Ron Light Bee killa
global.summary: Last month I reviewed the $1,200 Yozma IN10 and called it unstoppable at its price point. Then I promised to come back with another thousand dollars and the Pro. Here we are. The base $1200 IN10 made a compelling case for itself as a teen’s trail machine. The Pro makes a different argument entirely.

global.title: Sustainability, sustainability, and de-risking your fleet operations
global.summary: On today’s sustainably-produced episode of Quick Charge, we explore some of the different types of sustainability available to us in the world of electrification, celebrate some big wind and solar wins, and take a minute to enjoy some schadenfreude. more…

global.title: EV charging demand is stressing local grids, and Texture just raised $12.5M to tackle it
global.summary: Grid software startup Texture has raised a $12.5 million Series A round as utilities scramble to keep up with rising electricity demand from EVs, EV chargers, data centers, renewables, and extreme weather. more…

global.title: Hawaii’s newest NEVI charging station is part of a different kind of rollout
global.summary: Hawaii is continuing to build out its public EV charging network, and the state just opened a new NEVI-funded fast charging site at Kapalua Airport on Maui. more…

global.title: Jeep and Ram vehicles are about to get more affordable with prices under $40,000
global.summary: Stellantis plans to launch seven new Jeep, Ram, and Chrysler vehicles priced under $40,000, and two that will cost less than $30,000. more…

global.title: The Genesis GV90 has coach doors and a massive 27″ digital screen [Video]
global.summary: The GV90 will be available with Rolls-Royce-like coach doors as Genesis upscales into higher-end segments. With an expected debut soon, an uncovered model was found abandoned in a field alongside other Lucid, Hyundai, and Audi vehicles. more…

global.title: Solid-state EV batteries hit another major milestone in China
global.summary: Chinese lithium metal giant Ganfeng Lithium has begun producing what it calls the world’s first 10 Ah solid-state batteries with an energy density of 500 Wh/kg. The lithium giant has supply deals with Tesla, Volkswagen, Hyundai, and several other major OEMs for key EV battery materials. more…

global.title: Heybike’s new Saturn moped-style e-bike + $168 FREE bundle from $999, Anker SOLIX S2000 power station pre-sale deal for $599, more
global.summary: Just like yesterday’s edition with two new launch deals from some of our favorite brands, our Thursday Green Deals is following suit with two early-bird launch deals, starting with the Heybike Saturn Moped-Style e-bike (with two battery configurations) getting a $168 FREE bundle of gear from $999. R

global.title: Honda is recalling nearly 60,000 electric SUVs
global.summary: The Prologue was once among the top-selling EVs in the US, but Honda’s electric SUV has lost a bit of its luster. To make matters worse, Honda is now issuing a recall impacting almost 60,000 Prologue and Acura ZDX vehicles. more…

global.title: BYD launches upgraded Yuan Plus EV SUV with more range and flash charging for $18,000
global.summary: BYD launched the third-generation Yuan Plus, sold overseas as the Atto 3, with its new Flash Charging and nearly 400 miles of driving range. The upgraded electric SUV is on sale now, starting at less than $18,000. more…
